name: pipeline
style: Technical, dotted grid, Geist Mono, mint status dots, aubergine terminal panel.

slides.description: [ BUILD LOG · WEEK N · YYYY ] eyebrow + 3-line headline + meta strip (commits/files/stack/status).
3-5 vertical pipeline nodes with mint live / amber in-progress status chips.
Ship-log table: sha (mint) + message + tag. 3-6 rows from real git log.
Aubergine terminal panel with lavender prompts, lime OK markers, realistic commands.
Split before/after cards. After card has mint border + big mint metric.
One dominant mint number + label + context.
Section headline + 3 lesson rows with mint pulse dots.
Bracketed eyebrow + 2-line headline (mint accent) + mint button.

notes: Only layout using Geist Mono as voice cue.
Slide counter has pulsing mint dot — signature BIP aesthetic.
Terminal uses aubergine bg (not black) to visually distinguish from OS terminals.
